---
title: "PER-HE Publications"
---

This site automatically lists publications from members of the
[UK & Ireland Physics Higher Education Research community](https://per-he.org).

Publications are fetched weekly from researchers' [ORCID](https://orcid.org)
profiles and updated automatically. Papers are tagged as Physics Education
Research (PER) based on the journal they appear in or keywords in the title.

👉 **[Browse all publications](publications.qmd)**

👉 **[See all contributing authors](authors.qmd)**

---

*To have your publications listed here, please send your ORCID identifier to
the site maintainer, or visit [per-he.org](https://per-he.org) for more
information.*
